tests.test_name: Gap Analysis renders and JSON is complete for <role>
tests.journey: A user selects the Gap Analysis add-on for a given role, uploads a BDD fixture, triggers analysis, and verifies that the output panel and downloaded JSON both contain complete, well-formed gap analysis data with no unresolved values.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd', role 'QA Manager', add-on 'Gap Analysis', uploads 'bdd_sample.feature', and clicks 'Document and analyze test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation and analysis; 'Coverage Gaps' and 'Robustness Gaps' each appear exactly once; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains top-level key 'gap_analysis' with a non-empty 'coverage_gaps' appearing exactly once

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd', role 'Product Owner', add-on 'Gap Analysis', uploads 'bdd_sample.feature', and clicks 'Document and analyze test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation and analysis; 'Coverage Gaps' and 'Robustness Gaps' each appear exactly once; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains top-level key 'gap_analysis' with a non-empty 'coverage_gaps' appearing exactly once

tests.test_name: Gap analysis with regression layer passes layer context through to metadata
tests.journey: A QA Manager selects the Gap Analysis add-on with the 'Regression / Smoke' testing layer, uploads a BDD fixture, triggers analysis, and verifies that the downloaded JSON metadata correctly reflects the 'regression' testing layer.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Gap analysis with regression layer passes layer context through to metadata
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd', role 'QA Manager', add-on 'Gap Analysis', testing layer 'Regression / Smoke', uploads 'bdd_sample.feature', and clicks 'Document and analyze test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation and analysis; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values and shiftdoc metadata includes testing layer 'regression'

tests.test_name: Gap analysis with unit layer passes layer context through to metadata
tests.journey: A QA Manager selects the Gap Analysis add-on with the 'Unit' testing layer, uploads a BDD fixture, triggers analysis, and verifies that the downloaded JSON metadata correctly reflects the 'unit' testing layer.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Gap analysis with unit layer passes layer context through to metadata
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd', role 'QA Manager', add-on 'Gap Analysis', testing layer 'Unit', uploads 'bdd_sample.feature', and clicks 'Document and analyze test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation and analysis; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values and shiftdoc metadata includes testing layer 'unit'
